title: Rysons Over Door Ironing Hooks 2 pc | Holds Up to 10 Hangers

Great for at home, work, on holiday & more! Space-saving solution for ironing Suitable for home, work, and travel Fits over standard-sized (35mm) doors Hassle-free extra space creation No tools or complicated instructions required Compact and easy to store, foldable design Durable material for everyday use Ironing Door Hooks Help you to save space or to conveniently iron wherever you may be. Hang up up 10 These simple hooks can hang up to 10 items of clothing. Made of Durable plastic Made with durability in mind, the plastic material. No tools or complicated instructions needed! Fits over standard-sized doors Hanging over any standard-sized (35mm) door. This is a fantastic, hassle-free way of creating extra space in your home.
